seoTitle: Denman Prospect vs Downer — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Denman Prospect and Downer. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Denman Prospect vs Downer: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Denman Prospect and Downer.
heading: Denman Prospect vs Downer — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Denman Prospect, Australian Capital Territory and Downer, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Downer has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Denman Prospect (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Denman Prospect or Downer safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Denman Prospect has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Downer scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Denman Prospect scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Downer scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Denman Prospect or Downer?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Downer has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
